features.name: Wildcard Subdomain SSO (Single Sign-On)
features.description: Shared session mechanism across subdomains (*.veryresto.com in production, *.localtest.me in local development) using a custom cookie storage adapter (CookieStorage). Handles session persistence, validation of return URLs, and automatic token refresh.

features.name: Metadata Stripping & Cookie Size Optimization
features.description: Dynamic session serialization that strips the large user metadata object from the Supabase session token prior to writing to the browser cookie, avoiding silent 4KB truncation. Client-side adapter parses JWT claims on-the-fly to reconstruct user profile info.

features.name: Role-Based Access Control (App-RBAC)
features.description: Fine-grained permission access control model. Relates users, applications, roles, and permissions namespace-style (e.g. ipl_finder.read_files). Accessible through database RLS policies and the public.has_namespaced_permission security-definer RPC function.

features.name: Resident Onboarding & Waiting Room Workflow
features.description: Onboarding gate for new users to classify themselves as resident or non-resident, select their relationship to their house (owner, renter, household member, caretaker), request specific external affiliations, and record contact numbers. User is placed in pending state until verifier action.

features.name: Multi-House Affiliations
features.description: Enables residential profile records to associate with multiple house numbers from a master house directory with varying relationship types (e.g. owning one house but renting another), designating one active primary affiliation.

features.name: Immutable Audit Logging & Governance Ledger
features.description: Database-level and application-level logging that automatically records critical governance actions (such as approvals, rejections, suspensions, and app-role mappings) into the immutable public.governance_events table.

features.name: Global Moderation Dashboard
features.description: Administrative interface to manage user verification lifecycle (Approve/Reject/Suspend, requiring specific reasons), configure global access roles, update profile details, edit multi-house affiliations, provision app-specific permissions, and inspect system audit trails.

features.name: Transactional Email Notifications
features.description: Email notifications powered by Resend API that automatically email administrators upon new user registration and notify residents when their account approval status changes.

features.name: Ecosystem Analytics Tracker
features.description: Tracking mechanism that logs user interactions and application actions into a shared database table (analytics_events) governed by Row Level Security (RLS).

pages.name: Login Screen
pages.description: The centralized entry point for authentication using Google OAuth. Saves the validated redirect parameter to sessionStorage to preserve redirection context.

pages.name: Onboarding & Pending Review
pages.description: The waiting room portal. Displays a detailed form to capture classification, house details, and WhatsApp number, and shows a submission summary once details are saved.

pages.name: Rejected / Suspended Account Screen
pages.description: Access denied fallback page presented to users whose accounts are explicitly marked as suspended or rejected by administrators.

pages.name: Ecosystem Hub Landing Screen
pages.description: Portal dashboard displaying authorized connected applications (IPL Finder, Rekap Viewer, etc.) and lists of active permissions for the logged-in user.

pages.name: Admin Control Center
pages.description: Comprehensive governance suite partitioned into four tabs: User Approvals (with inline profile edits and multi-house affiliation management), Ecosystem Roles, Application-RBAC Access Mapping, and System Audit Logs.

apis.name: public.has_namespaced_permission
apis.description: Evaluates user permissions dynamically by checking if the user holds an App Role featuring the requested permission namespace, bypassing check for global admins. Signature: has_namespaced_permission(uid UUID, namespaced_perm TEXT) -> BOOLEAN

apis.name: public.is_platform_manager
apis.description: Helper check for Row Level Security policies. Returns true if user has the global 'admin', 'resident_verifier', or 'platform_moderator' role. Signature: is_platform_manager(uid UUID) -> BOOLEAN

apis.name: delete-users
apis.description: Administrative endpoint allowing global admins to completely delete user profiles and auth credentials from auth.users (cascading across the database), preventing self-deletion or deletion of other admins.

apis.name: get-users-auth-info
apis.description: Admin-only helper that calls Supabase Admin Auth API to retrieve list of user accounts containing auth registration and last sign-in timestamps.

apis.name: send-notification-email
apis.description: Email dispatcher integrated with Resend API. Accepts payloads for 'new_user' (notifying admin@veryresto.com), 'user_approved', and 'user_rejected' (notifying target resident email).

database_tables.name: public.profiles
database_tables.description: Extended user profile metadata mirroring auth.users 1-to-1. Controls global community relationship status.

database_tables.name: public.user_roles
database_tables.description: Platform-wide roles governing central administrative control.

database_tables.name: public.applications
database_tables.description: Registry of ecosystem applications participating in SSO/RBAC.

database_tables.name: public.app_roles
database_tables.description: Role templates defined by applications mapping to permissions.

database_tables.name: public.app_role_permissions
database_tables.description: Mapping join table binding permissions to app roles.

database_tables.name: public.user_app_roles
database_tables.description: Assignment records mapping specific users to app role templates.

database_tables.name: public.governance_events
database_tables.description: Immutable ledger tracking administrative actions and permissions mappings.

database_tables.name: public.houses
database_tables.description: Master list of houses in the community.

database_tables.name: public.profile_house_affiliations
database_tables.description: Relational mappings associating users to one or more houses.

database_tables.name: public.analytics_events
database_tables.description: Interaction tracker for all apps, backed by RLS.

database_tables.name: public.activity_logs
database_tables.description: General activity event logs for operations.

database_tables.name: public.user_permissions (Legacy)
database_tables.description: Compatibility projection layer syncing App-RBAC assignments to legacy row-per-permission formats.

database_tables.name: public.files (Legacy)
database_tables.description: Storage file uploads for document management (primarily ipl_finder).

background_jobs.name: on_auth_user_created
background_jobs.description: Runs public.handle_new_user() automatically to create a corresponding row in public.profiles with metadata copied from social metadata and initial approval_status set to 'pending'.

background_jobs.name: on_profile_approved_assign_resident_roles
background_jobs.trigger_event: AFTER UPDATE OF approval_status ON public.profiles
background_jobs.description: Runs public.handle_resident_approval() to automatically provision baseline resident roles for ipl_finder and rekap_viewer when a profile is transitioned to 'approved' and is classified as a 'resident'.

background_jobs.name: log_user_app_role_governance_trg
background_jobs.trigger_event: AFTER INSERT OR DELETE ON public.user_app_roles
background_jobs.description: Runs public.log_user_app_role_governance() to insert audit trails into public.governance_events documenting role grant or revocation actions.

background_jobs.name: sync_legacy_permissions_trg
background_jobs.trigger_event: AFTER INSERT OR DELETE ON public.user_app_roles
background_jobs.description: Runs public.sync_legacy_permissions() to synchronize legacy permissions mapping row states for user_permissions whenever App-RBAC allocations change for the ipl_finder app.

background_jobs.name: on_profile_created_assign_admin
background_jobs.description: Runs public.assign_admin_role() to verify if the newly registered user email matches 'veryresto@gmail.com' and auto-assigns the global 'admin' role if true.

background_jobs.name: update_profiles_updated_at
background_jobs.description: Runs public.update_updated_at_column() to auto-update modification timestamps.

background_jobs.name: update_files_updated_at
background_jobs.description: Runs public.update_updated_at_column() to auto-update file modification timestamps.
